---
title: 'Announcement: Changes are coming to this site'
date: '2016-05-26T05:22:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '829506295712209958'
blogger_filename: '/2016/05/announcement-changes-are-coming-to-this.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'News Events'
---

<h3>Announcement: Change to the web address... and other good stuff to come.</h3><br /><div><h4>I'm making some changes behind the scenes that will go live soon. They should be for the better. </h4></div><div>Some of you followed me for my banking material, others for other reasons. If you've been following DarrellWolfe.com for any amount of time, you may have noticed my material has been a bit scattered...&nbsp;</div><div><br />Listless even.<br /><br />I've recently discovered I am a #<a href="https://www.ted.com/talks/emilie_wapnick_why_some_of_us_don_t_have_one_true_calling?language=en">Multipotentialite</a>, and a wealth of random information.&nbsp;See the Ted Talk on #<a href="https://www.ted.com/talks/emilie_wapnick_why_some_of_us_don_t_have_one_true_calling?language=en">Multipotentialite</a>s (<a href="https://www.ted.com/talks/emilie_wapnick_why_some_of_us_don_t_have_one_true_calling?language=en">HERE</a>) by Emilie Wapnick.<br /><br />But since my personal interests and passions are so varied, it's hard to stay focused for an audience. <br /><br /><h4>Niche-ing Out</h4>I'm breaking up my topics into Niche Sites and Journals, each specific to a topic of interest. This should allow someone who liked my post on building credit but didn't want to read my thoughts on politics, to hand pick the topics they want to hear about.<br /><br /><h4>One Stop Shop</h4>I am now setting a Hub Site (<a href="http://darrellglenwolfe.blogspot.com/p/start-here-about.html">preview here</a>) so that I can hand out one business card to everyone, and they can pick from the topics they want to pursue. This will also allow for a single point of distrobution for other materials (books, podcasts, and more). <br /><br /><h4>Domain Change</h4>In the coming days/weeks, DarrellWolfe.com will become the home of the Hub Site. If you type in that web address, it will take you there. <br /><br /><h4>What's in store for this blog?</h4>This is my personal blog. <br /><br />Unlike my other niche sites that will be dedicated to a single topic of study or interest, this site will remain centered around the topics that are core to who I am, and what I'm about. <br /><br />I'm taking the lead from the master of marketing, Seth Godin, and simplifying. <a href="http://www.sethgodin.com/sg/">SethGodin.com (here)</a> is a single point of connection for everything he does/has, and his blog (http://sethgodin.typepad.com/) is tied to it.<br /><br />In the same way:<br /><ul><li>DarrellWolfe.com will be my Hub for all of my sites and projects.</li><li>darrellwolfe.blogspot.com will be my personal blog.</li></ul><div><br /></div><br /><h4>You'll notice the cover page is already re-branded:</h4><br /><div style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/blog-header-2016-3-0-d484be2b4850.jpg"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/blog-header-2016-3-0-e52a13f11cb5.jpg" /></a></div><blockquote class="tr_bq"><b>Exploring LIFE with Darrell Wolfe</b><i>Practical application of spiritual principles.</i><i> Exploring an un-complicated LIFE with God through stories, arm-chair theology, and random observations.</i></blockquote>I will be moving Niche specific content off of this blog to the other sites (you can find on the Hub Site), and honing the focus of this blog to this new streamlined lens.<br /><br /><b>Thanks for your patience as I make these changes. Feel free to check out the Hub Site as I keep building it out (<a href="http://darrellglenwolfe.blogspot.com/">here</a>). </b><br /><blockquote class="tr_bq"><i>Tweet These:<br />#<a href="http://ctt.ec/8E5X7">TellYourStory</a>#<a href="http://ctt.ec/5xc67">BeStillBeLed</a></i></blockquote><br />By <a href="https://plus.google.com/+DarrellWolfe/posts">Darrell Wolfe</a><br /><br />Story Teller | Creative | <a href="http://www.16personalities.com/infj-personality">INFJ</a> | <a href="https://www.gallupstrengthscenter.com/Purchase/en-US/Product?Path=Clifton%20StrengthsFinder">Intellection</a> | Learner | Ideation | Achiever | Input | Multipotentialite  <br /><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/about-20.html">New Here? Start HERE</a><br /><br /><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/cover-art-e0f7cc956c34.png"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/cover-art-267bc6b1d8d3.png" /></a><br /><br />For book suggestions, see my Amazon Store:<br /><br /><a href="http://astore.amazon.com/your0f4d-20"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/amazon-button-8fb3d7b755c7.gif" /></a><br /><div><div></div></div></div>
